name: Ahmad A.
one_line_review: "Very convenient to manage everything on one dashboard! Also, customer service is top notch!"
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

Easy to navigate dashboard, easy integration with all websites. Customer support is there when you need them and they take care of any questions you may have.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Not every website is available to be integrated with synup, but the main ones are.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

We're able to reply and manage all reviews without forgetting any.
